---
title: "About"
---

PaBST (and BaM!) — *Philosophy and Biology Shop Talks*, alongside the *Biology
and Models* Camp — is an annual workshop with a deliberately broad remit: anything
where biology and philosophy genuinely meet.

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

## Get involved

Want to host a future meeting, propose a talk, or join the mailing list? Reach
out to the organisers listed on each year's **People** page.

{{< lipsum 1 >}}
